change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: 1.1: 18 project team and LEU received of 12 days ToT on the training components (disability inclusion)1.2:  Mobilization 6 Itinerant Teachers after 10 days Training to support ECED Teacher and the parents on strategies to include children with disabilities.1.3: 265 head teachers and ECED teacher are trained on early screening and inclusion pedagogical approaches.1.4:  All children of planned ECED are screened (3000 in year 1 and 3000 in year 2) in the centre and catchment area1.5: 140 ECED teachers received training based inclusive Activity bank, picture-aided communication materials1.6: 140 teachers are oriented on disability inclusion policy, practice and provisions2.1: 250 SMC/PTA members oriented on inclusive education guideline (Mangalsen and Rautahat)2.2.: 120 ECED centre received supplementary learning materials and improve learning area of (Mangalsen and Rautahat)2.3: 250 parents of the children with functional limitation are oriented on integrated family support plan and process (Mangalsen, Rautahat) 2.4: at least quarterly mobile meeting among the ECED teacher carried out to share good practice, challenge and lesson learned.2.5: 216 children identified functional limitation are screened for Secondary level screening that identify functional limitations.2.6: 50 children received of appropriate and need base assistive devices (vision, hearing and mobility)2.7: 500 copies of Referral directory developed and provided to the concerned stakeholders2.8: 140 packages of the additional picture-aided communication materials developed and practiced at ECED.3.1.: at least 3 project Inception meeting conducted at local level and continuous coordination established3.2. at least 2 annual Joint Program Review at National Level conducted 3.3. 66 LG representatives, OPD leaders and Head Teachers received of 3 days Inclusive Education Training in 3 districts.3.4: at least 2 disability coordination committee meeting at local level supported to discuss agenda of the children with disabilities.3.5: at least quarterly supportive supervision and monitoring of the progress carried out by central team3.6: meaningful participation of the persons with disabilities ensured throughout provision of reasonable accommodations through the project cycle.3.7: 2 formative assessments (baseline and end line) of project conducted3.8: 1 best practice and lesson learned documented and shared for future reference. 3.8: 1 best pedagogical approach of the inclusive ECED developed and publicly shared.3.9: MPAC Meeting at 3 Municipality once in a year conducted and recommended incorporated into the project frame.3.10: CPAC meeting conducted once in a year at Social Welfare Council Nepal3.11. 2 Joint Monitoring Visit with stakeholders from CEHRD, MoEST and SWC for capturing the replicating practice3.12: at least 1 SWC- Monitoring and Evaluation visit to project implementation districts.

en.full: Inclusion of children with disabilities in Early Childhood Development and Education (Inclusive ECED)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
